inputs.label: Previous Inflow
inputs.businessContext: Muskingum routing - upstream inflow at previous time step

businessContext_i18n.en: Muskingum routing - upstream inflow at previous time step
businessContext_i18n.tr: Muskingum yönlendirmesi - önceki zaman adımında yukarı akış girişi
businessContext_i18n.fr: Propagation de Muskingum - débit entrant amont au pas de temps précédent
businessContext_i18n.es: Enrutamiento Muskingum - caudal de entrada aguas arriba en el paso de tiempo anterior

inputs.label: Current Inflow
inputs.businessContext: Muskingum routing - upstream inflow at current time step

businessContext_i18n.en: Muskingum routing - upstream inflow at current time step
businessContext_i18n.tr: Muskingum yönlendirmesi - mevcut zaman adımında yukarı akış girişi
businessContext_i18n.fr: Propagation de Muskingum - débit entrant amont au pas de temps actuel
businessContext_i18n.es: Enrutamiento Muskingum - caudal de entrada aguas arriba en el paso de tiempo actual

inputs.label: Previous Outflow
inputs.businessContext: Muskingum routing - downstream outflow at previous time step

businessContext_i18n.en: Muskingum routing - downstream outflow at previous time step
businessContext_i18n.tr: Muskingum yönlendirmesi - önceki zaman adımında aşağı akış çıkışı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Propagation de Muskingum - débit sortant aval au pas de temps précédent
businessContext_i18n.es: Enrutamiento Muskingum - caudal de salida aguas abajo en el paso de tiempo anterior

inputs.label: Time Step
inputs.businessContext: Routing time step Δt, must be less than K

businessContext_i18n.en: Routing time step Δt, must be less than K
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yönlendirme zaman adımı Δt, K'dan küçük olmalıdır
businessContext_i18n.de: Routing-Zeitschritt Δt, muss kleiner als K sein
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pas de temps de propagation Δt, doit être inférieur à K
businessContext_i18n.es: Paso de tiempo de enrutamiento Δt, debe ser menor que K

inputs.label: Storage Constant K
inputs.businessContext: Muskingum parameter K, travel time of flood wave through reach

businessContext_i18n.en: Muskingum parameter K, travel time of flood wave through reach
businessContext_i18n.tr: Muskingum parametresi K, taşkın dalgasının kol boyunca seyahat süresi
businessContext_i18n.de: Muskingum-Parameter K, Reisezeit der Hochwasserwelle durch den Flussabschnitt
businessContext_i18n.fr: Paramètre K de Muskingum, temps de parcours de l'onde de crue dans le tronçon
businessContext_i18n.es: Parámetro K de Muskingum, tiempo de viaje de la onda de crecida a través del tramo

inputs.label: Weighting Factor x
inputs.businessContext: Muskingum parameter x, 0 ≤ x ≤ 0.5, typical 0.1-0.3 for natural streams

businessContext_i18n.en: Muskingum parameter x, 0 ≤ x ≤ 0.5, typical 0.1-0.3 for natural streams
businessContext_i18n.tr: Muskingum parametresi x, 0 ≤ x ≤ 0.5, doğal akarsular için tipik 0.1-0.3
businessContext_i18n.de: Muskingum-Parameter x, 0 ≤ x ≤ 0,5, typisch 0,1-0,3 für natürliche Fließgewässer
businessContext_i18n.fr: Paramètre x de Muskingum, 0 ≤ x ≤ 0,5, typiquement 0,1-0,3 pour les cours d'eau naturels
businessContext_i18n.es: Parámetro x de Muskingum, 0 ≤ x ≤ 0.5, típicamente 0.1-0.3 para cauces naturales
